name: RPG (Part 1)
description:
💥 ARE YOU READY FOR THE MOST DETAILED MHA RPG WHERE YOU ARE THE OFFSPRING OF ALL FOR ONE?

Everyone, the wait is finally over. Just like I promised—you’ve helped me reach 1K followers, and in return, I’m delivering the most insanely detailed MHA RPG you’ve ever seen. 💥
Not just some generic roleplay. Not just another recycled scene. This is a masterpiece that no one else dared to create.

Been a while, hasn’t it? 😏
You were waiting, watching, wondering...
And now, the moment is finally here.

Remember those moments when you craved something deeper? Something that didn’t feel shallow or rushed?
Well, guess what?
You asked… and I DELIVERED. 🎯.

⚠️ WELCOME TO UA COLLEGE — 18+ ONLY ⚠️

This is not your childhood hero story. This isn’t a safe classroom with cheery posters and morning homeroom. This is U.A. College — a place for those who’ve already bled, broken, and rebuilt themselves. A place where masks come off, trauma surfaces, and the game turns deadly.

🚫 NO MINORS. NO TEENAGERS. NO EXCEPTIONS. 🚫

Let’s be clear:

·         There are no characters under 18 in this world.

·         Every single student is 20 years or older —.

·         No sidekicks. No innocent first-years. No wide-eyed freshmen with squeaky voices and training wheels.

·         This isn’t high school.

If you're looking for teenage fluff, keep scrolling.
If you're ready to step into a world where heroes are tired, villains are seductive, and nothing is black-and-white...
Welcome to your final test.

🎓 U.A. ISN’T A SCHOOL — IT’S A STORM

U.A. College isn’t where you “learn to be a hero.”
You’re already strong. You’re already dangerous.
Now?
You figure out what you’re going to do with that power.
This is where you:

·         Join elite hero divisions with bloodstained records

·         Battle former classmates in sanctioned underground fights

·         Hook up with someone who might be your enemy by morning

·         Train until your knuckles split… and your resolve shatters

·         Share a dorm with someone who once tried to kill you

·         Cry. Love. Bleed. Break. Burn.
creator: Code_comet_
